meta.context_summary: Requirements elicitation session was incomplete with minimal stakeholder input captured. System context, boundaries, and interfaces require further definition through additional stakeholder engagement.

possible_individuals.name: System Availability
possible_individuals.description: The system SHALL maintain operational availability during normal operating conditions
possible_individuals.rationale: Basic availability is fundamental for any operational system

possible_individuals.name: User Interface Access
possible_individuals.description: The system SHALL provide user interface access for authorized personnel
possible_individuals.rationale: User interaction capability is typically required for system operation

possible_individuals.name: System Response Time
possible_individuals.description: The system SHALL respond to user inputs within acceptable time limits
possible_individuals.rationale: Performance requirements are standard for interactive systems

possible_individuals.name: Data Integrity
possible_individuals.description: The system SHALL maintain data integrity throughout all operations
possible_individuals.rationale: Data integrity is critical for system reliability

possible_individuals.name: Access Control
possible_individuals.description: The system SHALL implement appropriate access control mechanisms
possible_individuals.rationale: Security and access control are typically required

possible_individuals.name: System Monitoring
possible_individuals.description: The system SHALL provide monitoring capabilities for operational status
possible_individuals.rationale: Monitoring is essential for system management

possible_individuals.name: Error Handling
possible_individuals.description: The system SHALL handle errors gracefully and provide appropriate notifications
possible_individuals.rationale: Robust error handling is required for reliable operation

possible_individuals.name: System Documentation
possible_individuals.description: The system SHALL be supported by comprehensive operational documentation
possible_individuals.rationale: Documentation supports system maintenance and operation

classes.name: Normal Operation
classes.description: System operates under standard conditions with all components functional and users performing routine tasks

classes.name: Component Failure
classes.description: One or more system components fail requiring system response and potential graceful degradation

classes.name: Scheduled Maintenance
classes.description: System undergoes planned maintenance activities with controlled shutdown and restart procedures

classes.name: Reduced Capacity Operation
classes.description: System operates with limited functionality due to partial component unavailability or environmental constraints

classes.name: System Startup
classes.description: System initialization sequence from powered-off state to full operational readiness

classes.name: System Shutdown
classes.description: Controlled system shutdown sequence ensuring data preservation and safe component deactivation

things.name: System Operator
things.description: Primary user responsible for system operation and monitoring

things.name: System Administrator
things.description: Technical personnel responsible for system configuration and maintenance

things.name: User Interface
things.description: Primary interface for user interaction with system functions

things.name: System Boundary
things.description: Logical boundary defining system scope and external interfaces

system_context.environment: Operating environment not specified - requires further elicitation
